scripts.copy-assets: cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html && cp src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/styles.css
scripts.dev: tsc && npm run copy-assets && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron .

extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: This app needs to record your screen.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera.
